title: Follow-on token-measurement plan authored
body: Quiet Cloaking Mist authored .agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/fitness-token-measurements-and-frontmatter-mandation.plan.md and routed the older fitness-frontmatter-manifest-sweep plan to it as superseded analysis. Requested docs/ADR, assumptions, and code reviews are now running. I am staying inside claim e86af95a and will not stage/commit until reviewer findings are dispositioned and live state is re-polled.
